objective: Make candidate image identity portable across containerd and classic Docker stores by binding the verified archive config digest while retaining and validating the local OCI manifest/index ID as diagnostic evidence.
executable_blocker: R08B-R13 proved two reproducible builds and equal inventories, then stopped because Docker 29 containerd Image.Id is an OCI index digest while the transport archive's portable load identity is its config digest.
acceptance_commands: physical candidate prepare and verify on containerd store
full tests and exact PR/merge/IntegrationReceipt-head CI
forbidden_scope: runtime, Containerfile, contracts, dependencies, provider, policy, config, migration or CI mutation
accepting an archive without recursive digest/config binding
provider call, live/VPS/canonical action, candidate cut or DONE claim
